title: Comanthera linearis
taxonomy: Comanthera linearis is a species of plant in the family Eriocaulaceae. It belongs to the genus Comanthera, which is a genus of plants commonly found in South America. The Eriocaulaceae family consists of aquatic and terrestrial plants, often adapted to living in wet environments. Comanthera linearis is native to Brazil and can be found in wetlands and tropical regions. This plant classification highlights its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment.
